ImageRGB(3) Library Functions Manual ImageRGB(3)

NAME

ImageRGB - ImageRGB structure for NEON renderers.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/video/ascii/common.h>

Data Fields


int w
int h
uint8_t * pixels

Detailed Description

ImageRGB structure for NEON renderers.

Simplified RGB image format for NEON optimizations.

Definition at line 233 of file video/ascii/common.h.
